query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  u.createdAt,
  dp.enabled AS digestEnabled,
  dp.frequency,
  dp.dayOfWeek,
  dp.timeOfDay,
  dp.timezone,
  dp.lastSentAt,
  dp.nextScheduledAt,
  dp.totalSent,
  dp.territory,
  dp.productLine
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN digestPreferences dp ON dp.userId = u.id
ORDER BY u.role DESC, u.name ASC;
